responses: Hello. How can I assist you today?
Hi there. What do you need help with?
Kamusta. Paano kita matutulungan ngayon?

patterns: how to apply for pwd id
where can i get pwd id
responses: You may apply for a PWD ID at your local PDAO or municipal social welfare office.
For PWD ID application, please visit your local PDAO and prepare the required medical documents.
Maaaring kumuha ng PWD ID sa inyong local PDAO o municipal social welfare office.
You can apply for PhilHealth at the nearest office or through their online portal.
For PhilHealth concerns, visit the nearest PhilHealth office or check their official website.
Maaari kang mag-apply sa PhilHealth office o sa kanilang online portal.

patterns: what are the benefits of pwd
responses: PWDs are entitled to discounts, priority lanes, and selected support services under Philippine law.
Persons with disabilities may avail discounts on medicine, transport, and other covered services.
May benepisyo ang PWD tulad ng discounts, priority lane, at iba pang suporta.
Please check with your municipal or provincial LGU for the exact location of your PDAO office.
The PDAO office is usually located within the LGU or municipal government offices.
Karaniwang nasa loob ng LGU o municipal government offices ang PDAO.

patterns: kailangan ko ng medikal na tulong
responses: Please proceed to the nearest health center or contact your LGU health office for assistance.
If this is urgent, go to the nearest clinic or hospital immediately.
Kung ito ay emergency, pumunta agad sa pinakamalapit na clinic o ospital.

I can help with reminders in a future version of this prototype.
Ang reminder feature ay isasama sa susunod na module ng AbleBot.
I am still being trained. For now, I can help with basic accessibility and government service inquiries.

Patuloy pa akong sinasanay. Maaari mong itanong ang tungkol sa PWD ID, PhilHealth, o benepisyo ng PWD.
